title: Purple Cobwebs + Outlines
description: Purple Cobwebs with an outline for clear and clean PvP
body:
Purple cobwebs bring a bold, clean outline that’s easy to spot in intense fights. The deep color adds strong contrast without being distracting, helping clips look more defined and giving PvP a smoother, more controlled visual feel overall.

🎯 Strong outline for clear visibility
⚡ Smooth appearance during fast fights
🎥 More defined clips for better viewing
💜 Rich purple color that stands out
🧼 Clean style for a sharp, polished look
